title: Wind of Change
why_this_song: Wind of Change by Scorpions (1990) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: On a glory night (a glory night)
Where the children of tomorrow share their dreams (share their dreams)
With you and me (with you and me)
Take me to the magic of the moment
Listening to the wind of change
Listening to the wind of change

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wind" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wind" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "change" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "change" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Take me to the magic of the moment
On a glory night (a glory night)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Scorpions one question about "Wind of Change", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Scorpions sobre "Wind of Change", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Wind of Change" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Wind of Change" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Wind of Change" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Wind of Change" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
